---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for this project
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What problem does this solve?

Describe the use case this feature would unblock. This plugin stays
intentionally minimal, so a concrete need helps evaluate whether it fits.

## Proposed solution

Describe what you'd like to happen.

## Does it require a network call?

This plugin makes no network calls by design and reports only what Claude
Code already holds locally. If your idea needs data from elsewhere, say so —
it likely belongs in a separate tool.

## Alternatives considered

Any workarounds you're using today, or other approaches you considered.

## Additional context

Anything else relevant.
